title: Goal Teams V2.40 release promotion state
$comment: Revised for follow-up independent review; this contract does not self-attest accepted or passed.

public_scan_baseline_review.$comment: In-tree review binds reviewer and reviewed sets only; final candidate commit/tree are deliberately excluded to avoid a Git hash self-reference.

public_scan_approval_reviewer.$comment: Detached CP05 reviewer repeats the exact in-tree review identity/set/time and additionally binds the final candidate commit/tree.

expected_before.$comment: Required by the semantic validator only when action is listed in x-semantic-validator.external_actions_require_expected_before.

x-recovery-matrix.absent: execute the persisted intent exactly once, then live readback
x-recovery-matrix.exact: do not replay; bind the matching prior intent and append the completion marker
x-recovery-matrix.conflict: stop permanently for this version until an authorized external reconciliation preserves the frozen identity
x-recovery-matrix.unavailable: remain blocked and retry only the readback; never infer success
x-recovery-matrix.published_exact_after_marker_crash: exact when release ID, target commit, four asset IDs and digests all match the prior intent
x-recovery-matrix.main_exact_draft_exact_before_publish: do not replay main; execute only the persisted CP17.release_publish intent while the remote promotion lock remains active
x-recovery-matrix.release_exact_after_publish_marker_crash: do not republish; require immutable=true and exact release ID, target commit, tag and four asset IDs/digests, then append the marker
x-recovery-matrix.github_authority_drift: conflict before any further external write
x-recovery-matrix.promotion_lock_unavailable: blocked; retry live readback only and never infer the lock is active
